title: TS Library Model Zoo Console
summary: Build a model-zoo console for time-series experiments, comparisons, and production-oriented selection across advanced architectures.
knowledge_base: TS Library Model Zoo Console is positioned as a Forecast Model Zoo starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Build a model-zoo console for time-series experiments, comparisons, and production-oriented selection across advanced architectures.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on timeseries, model-zoo, forecasting, benchmark.

Production differentiation focus: Turn upstream forecast model zoo capabilities into a production-style application with operations-facing workflows.; Add deployment packaging, monitoring hooks, and screenshot-ready demos instead of notebook-only output.; Connect model behavior to concrete business decisions so the project is easier to evaluate and present.
why_high_score: Official or primary upstream repo with 12058 GitHub stars.
Active maintenance signal with recent push at 2026-04-09T03:04:28Z.
A Library for Advanced Deep Time Series Models for General Time Series Analysis.
differentiation_hooks: Turn upstream forecast model zoo capabilities into a production-style application with operations-facing workflows.
Add deployment packaging, monitoring hooks, and screenshot-ready demos instead of notebook-only output.
Connect model behavior to concrete business decisions so the project is easier to evaluate and present.
